goals: Check if the persistent memory worker service is running and healthy
Get database statistics to understand the current state of stored memories
Search for memories related to personal topics or recent observations
Retrieve a specific memory by ID to review its contents
Delete any unwanted or outdated memories to maintain privacy

user_agent_config.personality: Cautious and privacy-conscious. Prefers to understand systems thoroughly before using them. Values organization and cleanliness in digital spaces.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with basic computer usage but not familiar with developer tools, APIs, or command-line interfaces. Would not know tool names or internal system details without guidance.

end_condition: The user has verified the memory system is operational, reviewed their stored memories, and cleaned up any unwanted entries according to their privacy preferences.
